escalation.rationale: Active US-Iran war enters fifth week with Trump threatening Iran's oil infrastructure and considering NATO withdrawal amid alliance fractures.

ticker_items: Trump threatens Iran oil hub, considers NATO withdrawal
Iran reportedly requests ceasefire, Tehran denies claims
UAE offers military support for Strait of Hormuz operation
Russia launches spring offensive with 400 drones on Ukraine
Markets rally on Iran war de-escalation hopes

new_entrant.text: UAE offers military support to US for forcing open Strait of Hormuz, potentially entering Iran conflict.

eastern_europe.description: Russia launched nearly 400 drones at Ukrainian civilian areas as spring offensive continues.
Russian daytime drone strikes kill four across Ukraine as war enters fifth year.

middle_east.description: Iran hit Kuwaiti oil tanker in drone attack amid escalating regional strikes.
Israeli bombardment targeted area near Iranian embassy in Beirut.
Israeli bombardment near Iranian embassy in Dahieh causes chaos with armed men in streets.

claimed_totals.claim: Iran casualties from Al Jazeera tracker
US soldiers killed in Iran war

ukraine.text: Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: Marking one month of our joint campaign with the US, we are systematically crushing the terrorist regime that for decades cried: 'Death to America, Death to Israel.'
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Prime Minister of Israel

middle_east.text: Iran no longer poses an existential threat to Israel after what he described as a month of joint U.S.-Israeli operations
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Prime Minister of Israel

middle_east.text: U.S. could end war in Iran in two to three weeks
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Marking one month of our joint campaign with the US, we are systematically crushing the terrorist regime that for decades cried: 'Death to America, Death to Israel.'
middle_east.speaker: Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Prime Minister

middle_east.text: Open the Strait of Hormuz or we will send you back to the Stone Age
middle_east.speaker: Trump
middle_east.title: President

observers.description: Pakistan has emerged as an unlikely mediator in the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran. However, the country is simultaneously engaged in its most severe fighting in decades with neighboring Afghanistan, complicating its diplomatic role.

Spain's Defense Minister stated that the United States and Israel 'cannot be the ones who decide what rules apply in the world.' Madrid continues to refuse supporting military operations against Iran despite US pressure on NATO allies.

Argentina officially designated the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps as a terrorist organization. This represents a significant shift in the country's position and marks its formal alignment with US-Israeli operations against Iran.

UAE offers military support to US for Strait of Hormuz operations and urges UN Security Council approval for military action. Authorities reportedly downplaying damage from Iranian strikes according to Bellingcat analysis.
PM Starmer uses Iran conflict and frayed US relations to justify closer EU ties. UK part of widening transatlantic rift over Mideast war response.
Views Trump's NATO threats as defense opportunity with Europe seeking new partners. Recent EU defense pact positions India as alternative to US reliance.

financial.notes: Global stocks rally and oil prices fall on hopes of Iran war de-escalation after Trump ceasefire claims.

update_log.text: World markets surge on Iran war de-escalation hopes following Trump ceasefire claims
UAE offers military support for US Strait of Hormuz operations
Trump claims Iran requested ceasefire, threatens oil infrastructure
Russian daytime drone strikes across Ukraine kill four civilians
Iran fires missiles across Middle East as Trump threatens key oil infrastructure
IRGC confirms Major General Jamshid Eshaqi killed in US-Israeli strikes
Trump strongly considering withdrawing US from NATO after alliance refuses Iran support
Iranian drone attack hits Kuwaiti oil tanker off Dubai
Netanyahu declares Iran no longer existential threat after month-long campaign
